name: Diazepam
description: Ibenzodiazepine esebenza ixesha elide. Isetyenziselwa ukulawula ukuhlutha, i-muscle spasm, kunye ne-anxiolysis. Ijeli yeRectal (Diastat) iluncedo kwizicwangciso zentsimi xa i-IV ingafumaneki. Ixesha elide kunelorazepam.
indications: Ukuqhawuka kwezihlunu ngenxa yokwenzakala komnqonqo okanye i-tetanus
dose: Ukubamba: 5-10 mg IV tyhala kancinci. Phinda u-q10-15 min (ubuninzi be-30 mg). I-Rectal: 0.2-0.5 mg / kg. Ukufunxwa kwe-IM kuyaguquguquka -- yiphephe i-IM ukuba kuyenzeka.
warnings: Ukufunxa kwe-IM kuyaguquguquka kwaye kubuhlungu -- khetha i-IV, irectal, okanye usebenzise i-midazolam IM endaweni yoko.
Ukwenzakala kwe-Nerve agent: i-diazepam ibandakanyiwe kwiikhithi ze-CHEMPACK zokuxhuzula kwi-cholinergic crisis.

pediatric.dose: IV: 0.1-0.3 mg / kg (max 10 mg). I-Rectal: 0.3-0.5 mg / kg. Sebenzisa indlela yomqolo xa i-IV ingekho.
pediatric.note: Ijeli ye-diastat ye-rectal ibaluleke kakhulu ekubanjweni kwabantwana kwiisethingi zentsimi.

obstetric.note: Unqumla i-placenta. Inokubangela i-hypotonia yosana, ukudakumba kokuphefumla. Sebenzisa kuphela ukuxhuzula komama ongaphenduliyo kwi-magnesium.

source: JTS CPG / CHEMPACK Program / Standard Seizure Management
